versions.version_description: More complex chords (7th, 9th, etc.) are included, and the pitch drop at the end is approximated by modulating a half-step down.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
It's fine, it's cool[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]Bm[/ch]
You can say that we are nothing but you know the truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
And guess I'm the fool[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]Bm[/ch]
With her arms out like an angel through the car sunroof[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
 I don't wanna call it off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
 But you don't wanna call it love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
 You only wanna be the one that I call baby[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Good luck babe, well good luck babe[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Good luck babe, well good luck babe[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
I'm cliché, "Who cares?"[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
It's a sexually explicit kind of love affair[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
And I cry, it's not fair[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
I just need a little lovin', I just need a little air[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]
 Think I'm gonna call it off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
 Even if you call it love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]                            [ch]Em[/ch]
 I just wanna love someone who calls me baby[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Good luck babe, well good luck babe[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Good luck babe, well good luck babe[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]Em9[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em9[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]

[Bridge]
[tab]             [ch]Em9[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
And when you wake up next to him in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em9[/ch]                               [ch]Em[/ch]
With your head in your hands, you're nothing more than his wife[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em9[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
And when you think about me all of those years ago[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em9[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
You're standing face to face with "I told you so"[/tab]
           N.C.
You know I hate to say it, I told you so
[tab]           [ch]Em9[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]
You know I hate to say it but, I told you so[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]A[/ch]
Good luck babe (well good luck), well good luck babe (well good luck)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]A[/ch]
Good luck babe (well good luck), well good luck babe (well good luck)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]


(End of song slows down gradually so that by the end the pitch of the last chord is really F#.)
